## Registration

### Registration now open!

<button class="btn btn-primary" style="background-color: #009473" onclick="window.location.href='https://events.zoom.us/ev/AgREbBib55cz4PPbRpOTR7XzT-zUrXaHOet-RwMsMk24X5bVUNyY~AsC-xAaNTK3SJonyxOzHRJiBVfSuSMvEirES70DnkxL6o8hdnu5mpfn79A'">

**REGISTER HERE**

</button>

### Registration Pricing

The following table lists the registration fees for three categories of attendees: students, academics and members of non-profit organizations, and professionals employed in industry who do not have non-profit status. All prices are in U.S. dollars. 

| Category              |  Price |
|-----------------------|:-------:|
| Students              |  \$30   |
| Academic / Non-profit |  \$50   |
| Industry              |  \$70   |

### Scholarships: Diversity & Need-Based

A limited number of complimentary registrations are available to enable community members to attend when they would otherwise be unable due to a lack of funding. We place an emphasis on funding applicants who are from historically underrepresented or untapped groups, from low GDP countries, and/or those of lower socioeconomic status.

Tell us why you need one of the limited number of complimentary registrations. Limit 500 characters. 

**Scholarship application deadline:** Friday, April 3rd, 2026

**Scholarship award notification:** Friday, April 10th, 2026

**Scholarship applications now closed**

<!-- <button class="btn btn-primary" -->

<!-- style = "background-color: #009473" -->

<!-- onclick="window.location.href='https://forms.gle/kBWL6PfsrguDxWkx5'"> -->

<!--   **Apply for scholarship** -->

<!-- </button> -->
